[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A light-blue-haired anime-style character is shown in the foreground, with a gray bird-like figure held close on the right, in a dim, stone-walled background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a stylized person with light blue, straight shoulder-length hair and pale skin, wearing a dark blue cloak or robe with a light beige hood lining around the neck. Their face is turned slightly toward the viewer, with a calm, neutral expression and partially visible eyes. On the right side of the image, a gray, bird-like or creature-like figure with a long beak is held up and angled toward the character; part of a white furry texture is visible near the lower right, and the creature’s wing or body appears gray with darker markings.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor or enclosed environment with gray stone blocks forming a wall. Lighting is low and the right side of the scene has a purple glow, suggesting an illuminated area or portal-like light source off to the right.

Visual Details:
The character occupies the left half of the frame from the shoulders up, facing forward at a slight angle. The hair has sharp, anime-like strands and pale highlights. The clothing is predominantly dark blue with a lighter beige trim around the collar area. The right-side glow casts a bluish-purple tint onto parts of the character and the held creature. The camera angle is straight-on and the image is tightly framed, focusing on the character and the creature.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style character in a dark blue outfit holding a gray bird-like creature. The scene is set against a gray stone wall with a purple light glow coming from the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
